summary: Verified Solana Chain of Custody fix - Solana addresses now return valid custody analysis instead of 'coming soon' error. All 28 tests pass: 14 new tests verifying Solana support + 14 updated regression tests.

test_results.frontend: N/A - Backend-only fix, no frontend changes

context_for_next_testing_agent: Solana Chain of Custody is now fully functional. Verified: (1) Solana addresses return valid custody analysis with chain='solana', custody_chain, origin_points, summary, (2) Known Solana exchanges (Coinbase, Binance, Kraken, etc) and DEXes (Jupiter, Raydium, Orca) are configured, (3) Bitcoin still shows 'coming soon', (4) EVM chains continue to work.

bugs_verified_fixed.description: Solana Chain of Custody was showing 'coming soon' error instead of working

fix_details.what_was_fixed: Implemented full Solana support in custody_service.py
key_changes: Added _get_solana_incoming_transfers() to fetch SOL transfers via Alchemy API
Added known_solana_exchanges dict with Coinbase, Binance, Kraken, Bybit, Gate.io addresses
Added known_solana_dexes dict with Jupiter, Raydium, Orca, Saber, Mercurial addresses
Updated analyze_chain_of_custody() to route Solana to dedicated analysis method
Updated get_address_label() to handle Solana addresses (case-sensitive)
